name: CA Saatvik Gupta
bio: CA Saatvik Gupta is the sole Proprietor and Principal CA of S.G. & Associates. Fellow Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (FCA) with a Information Systems Audit (DISA) qualification, he leads all statutory audit, tax litigation, GST advisory, and corporate structuring engagements.

name: Neha Sharma
role: Leads client bookkeeping, monthly GST reconciliation, and accounting supervision under the guidance of the Principal CA.
bio: Neha oversees day-to-day corporate ledger maintenance, monthly GST reconciliation, and TDS compliance workflows under the supervision of Principal CA Saatvik Gupta.

name: Rohit Patel
role: Assists the Principal CA in statutory audit execution, financial statement compilation, and tax audit workpapers.
bio: Rohit specializes in fieldwork execution for statutory audits, preparation of CARO 2020 annexures, and drafting Income Tax audit files under supervision.

name: Pooja Mehta
role: Performs GST portal verification, e-way bill reviews, and MCA compliance support supervised by the Principal CA.
bio: Pooja handles monthly GST return drafts, MCA e-filings, and client data gathering for annual audit assignments under direct supervisorial oversight.

name: Aarav Shah
role: Supports direct tax compliance preparation, Section 43B(h) MSME verification, and audit working paper assembly.
bio: Aarav assists in assembling Income Tax e-filing data, performing MSME vendor payment schedule checks, and auditing operational ledgers under principal supervision.
